title: The Big Picture: The Capesize market
section_path: The Big Picture: The Capesize market
section_path_text: The Big Picture: The Capesize market
summary:
Main
By Mark Nugent
Looking forward to Q3
Having reached the halfway point of the year, we look at what has been driving the recent drawdown in Capesize rates and what may be in store for the rest of the year. The BCI has sold off $4,084/day in June declining by 16.8% and FFA prices decreasing by 29.6% on the July contract and 22.6% on the Q3. However, at the mid-way point of the year, the index has printed a 3.6% gain YTD.
